name: I'm on Hickory Ave
hints: Hickory Avenue stretching east-west through the town.
EAST leads to the cul-de-sac. WEST returns to the main intersection.
EAST to the cul-de-sac at east end of Hickory (room 10, large house). WEST back to Main & Hickory (room 3).
notes: Hickory Ave connector. EAST to cul-de-sac (room 10) with the large house. WEST to Main & Hickory (room 3).
